notes: Run 46 (2026-05-17): 120-card window audited (Koffing sv09-091 pos 730 through Marill sv08-073 pos 849). Ledger contains 11 finding entries (6 fixes + 5 engine gaps). CONTINUATION_REQUIRED because target of 25 not reached. Next run starts at Marill | TEF | 64 | sv05-064 (position 851).

tcgdex_effects_extracted.name: Bemusing Aroma
tcgdex_effects_extracted.raw_text: Flip a coin. If tails, your opponent's Active Pokemon is now Confused.

audit_ledger.notes: Handler _bemusing_aroma applied StatusCondition.CONFUSED to player.active (self) on tails instead of opp.active. Fixed line 8176 attacks.py: player.active → opp.active.

tcgdex_effects_extracted.name: Fade Out
tcgdex_effects_extracted.raw_text: Put this Pokemon and all attached cards into your hand.

audit_ledger.notes: Handler _fade_out cleared energy_attached without returning source cards to hand. Rewrote to follow _tuck_tail pattern: find source cards in discard/deck, move to hand before clearing attachments.

tcgdex_effects_extracted.name: Overvolt Discharge
tcgdex_effects_extracted.raw_text: Once during your turn, you may discard all Lightning Energy from this Pokemon. If you do, put 5 damage counters on your opponent's Active Pokemon.

audit_ledger.notes: svp-153 was registered as register_passive_ability instead of register_ability with _overvolt_discharge handler. Fixed to match sv08-059 registration.

tcgdex_effects_extracted.name: Overvolt Discharge
tcgdex_effects_extracted.raw_text: Once during your turn, you may discard all Lightning Energy from this Pokemon. If you do, put 5 damage counters on your opponent's Active Pokemon.

audit_ledger.notes: svp-159 was registered as register_passive_ability with incorrect 'Magnezone' comment. Fixed to use register_ability with _overvolt_discharge handler. Also corrected misleading comment.

tcgdex_effects_extracted.name: Unrelenting Onslaught
tcgdex_effects_extracted.raw_text: If 1 of your other Ancient Pokemon used an attack during your last turn, this attack does 150 more damage.

audit_ledger.notes: Handler _koraidon_onslaught_flag lacked _is_ancient() filter; any benched Pokemon with last_attack_name triggered the +150 bonus. Fixed: added if _is_ancient(p) filter to any() check.

tcgdex_effects_extracted.name: Confectionary Gift
tcgdex_effects_extracted.raw_text: Once during your turn, you may heal 30 damage from 1 of your Pokemon.

audit_ledger.notes: Handler _confectionary_gift used player.active as caster instead of _find_in_play(player, action.card_instance_id). Fixed to correctly identify Alcremie ex when it is on the bench.

tcgdex_effects_extracted.name: Lucky Helmet
tcgdex_effects_extracted.raw_text: If the Pokemon this card is attached to is in the Active Spot and is damaged by an attack from your opponent's Pokemon (even if this Pokemon is Knocked Out), draw 2 cards.

behavioral_evidence.description: Draw-on-damage triggered effect requires post-damage callback hooks in base.py/_apply_damage. Current engine architecture does not support tool-triggered draw effects. Structural change deferred.

audit_ledger.notes: ENGINE GAP: Lucky Helmet draw-2-on-hit effect not implemented. Requires damage pipeline hook not present in current architecture.

tcgdex_effects_extracted.name: Light Ball
tcgdex_effects_extracted.raw_text: Attacks used by the Pikachu ex this card is attached to do 50 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokemon ex (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

behavioral_evidence.description: Tool-attached +50 damage modifier for Pikachu ex against opponent ex requires per-attack damage modifier hook keyed on attached tool. Not implemented in current architecture.

audit_ledger.notes: ENGINE GAP: Light Ball +50 damage modifier for Pikachu ex not implemented. Requires tool-modifier hook in damage calculation pipeline.

tcgdex_effects_extracted.name: Legacy Energy
tcgdex_effects_extracted.raw_text: If the Pokemon this card is attached to is Knocked Out by damage from an attack from your opponent's Pokemon, that player takes 1 fewer Prize card. This effect of your Legacy Energy can't be applied more than once per game.
tcgdex_effects_extracted.reason: special energy with triggered prize reduction effect

behavioral_evidence.description: Handler only sets EnergyType.ANY provision. KO prize-reduction effect requires check_ko / prize-taking hook in base.py plus one-per-game global state tracking. Structural change deferred.

audit_ledger.notes: ENGINE GAP: Legacy Energy KO prize reduction not implemented. check_ko in base.py does not inspect attached energy cards for prize modifiers.

tcgdex_effects_extracted.name: Lillie's Pearl
tcgdex_effects_extracted.raw_text: If the Lillie's Pokemon this card is attached to is Knocked Out by damage from an attack from your opponent's Pokemon, your opponent takes 1 fewer Prize card.
tcgdex_effects_extracted.reason: tool with triggered prize reduction effect

behavioral_evidence.description: Same architectural limitation as Legacy Energy. check_ko in base.py does not inspect attached tool cards for prize reduction callbacks.

audit_ledger.notes: ENGINE GAP: Lillie's Pearl KO prize reduction not implemented. Requires check_ko hook not present in current architecture.

tcgdex_effects_extracted.name: Night Joker
tcgdex_effects_extracted.raw_text: Choose 1 of your Benched N's Pokemon's attacks and use it as this attack.

behavioral_evidence.description: Handler auto-selects highest-damage attack from bench N's Pokemon. No ChoiceRequest issued to player. Implementing player choice requires multi-step ChoiceRequest (choose Pokemon, then attack index). Deferred to preserve AI simulation behavior.

audit_ledger.notes: ENGINE GAP: N's Zoroark ex Night Joker auto-selects attack without player choice. Implementing proper ChoiceRequest is a structural change deferred from this PR.
